prompt: Make a poster that promotes the pancake special offers at 'Henry's Grill'. Customers can order pancakes with just $2.99 each if they order a breakfast set. The poster should include the image provided somewhere in the design.
prompt_refined: Generate a promotional poster for 'Henry's Grill' advertising their pancake special offer. The poster must prominently incorporate image 1, which showcases a stack of golden pancakes with syrup actively being poured over them, a pat of butter on top, and fresh strawberries and a coffee cup visible in the background. The poster must clearly display the following text: 'Pancakes: $2.99 each with any breakfast set!'.
objects: syrup actively being poured over pancakes
pat of butter on top of pancakes
hand holding a creamer/pitcher pouring syrup
text: 'Pancakes: $2.99 each with any breakfast set!'
